sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.T.R.A. No. 142 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection No.01 2. For order on CMA No.1393/2024 (exemption) 3. For order on CMA No.1394/2024 (stay) 4. For hearing of Main Case 27.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aleem, advocate for applicant Per office note, this reference application is time barred. Notwithstanding the foregoing, this matter has been pending since 2024 without any progress and no notice has been served till date. On 20.01.2026, the following order was passed:- “Learned counsel seeks time to address the office objection regarding limitation. At his request, to come up on 27.01.2026”. Today, learned counsel is again unable to assist the Court and merely seeks time. This matter has clogged the docket since 2024 and there is no apparent reason to perpetuate the same. Accordingly, in view of the above, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ashraf
